name: codex-error-memory
description: Local error-memory guardrails for Codex agents: remember recurring technical failures, search prior fixes, and write reusable debugging knowledge into a small SQLite database.

interface.shortDescription: Remember recurring project errors and reuse proven fixes.
interface.longDescription: A local SQLite-backed memory plugin for technical errors, failed commands, build failures, deployment issues, and repeated bugs. It helps Codex search prior fixes before debugging and record new lessons after resolution.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Codex Error Memory to check whether this error has happened before.
